panels.description: The number of client VMs connected and their status
panels.title: Client JVMs

panels.description: the current absolute max waiting time for the compilation start (across all  VMs)
panels.title: Time to start compilation

targets.expr: histogram_quantile($quantile, sum by (le, method, uri) (increase(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{$cluster_label="$cluster",$namespace_label="$ns",$app_label="mgmt-gateway", outcome="SUCCESS"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile($quantile, sum by (le, method, uri, outcome) (increase(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{$cluster_label="$cluster",$namespace_label="$ns",$app_label="mgmt-gateway", outcome!="SUCCESS"}[$__rate_interval])))
